description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The lower portion is a bright orange color, while the upper section is white, creating a high-visibility contrast. The surface shows some subtle scuff marks and dirt, indicating light outdoor use. The base is flat and slightly raised, likely made of a heavier material to prevent tipping. There are no visible reflective stripes, logos, or markings on the cone. The tip is rounded and solid, and the overall condition appears lightly used but intact.
description: A high-visibility orange and white traffic cone with a wide, stable square base and a rounded tip, showing light wear.
description_view_0: Front view of the traffic cone showing the orange lower section, white upper section, and square base with visible scuff marks.
description_view_1: Side view of the cone, similar to the front, highlighting the smooth transition between orange and white and the flat, stable base.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same color separation and visible surface wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the orange and white sections and the square base, with minor surface blemishes.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and white, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and slightly raised, made of thicker plastic for stability, with subtle surface texturing and minor scuff marks.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The cone appears lightly used, with some scuff marks and minor dirt but no significant damage.
